channel.title: Arts on errbufferoverfl
channel.description: Recent content in Arts on errbufferoverfl
channel.copyright: This content is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International unless otherwise specified.

item.title: Anarchic Illustrations
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: Drawings, prints and stickers promoting the abolition of traditional forms of government and institutions. All my anarchic themed illustrations are available as high-res downloads, available under CC by 4.

item.title: Freedom is not Given its Taken
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)

item.title: Work in Progress
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: Work that is still in progress and being worked on. Freedom is not Given its TakenCheck it out on Ko-Fi →

item.title: Character Studies
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: Little illustrations and spreads that have been created to explore the traits of characters, featuring my favourites from television shows, movies and my imagination.

item.title: Vegetable Portraits
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: Portraits of my favourite and seasonal vegetables created using a variety of artistic mediums, they act as consistent theme that records changes in art style.

item.title: 👑 Catherine the Great - A Tiny Character Study
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)

item.title: 100 days of gouache
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: The concept of a 100 days project is you commit to doing something consistently for 100 days straight. For a non sequential 100 days I created a [[notes/gouache|gouache]] painting using 100 Days of Drawing by Jennifer Lewis.

item.title: [Supporters] Ko-Fi Weekly Roundup
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: Welcome to another weekly roundup that are becoming fortnightly roundups ~ For the past week-ish I’ve been on a well needed break from work taking a couple of days to visit South Australia and pick up a new hobby in the form of gouache painting which I’ll get to soon.
